name: Audi
philosophy: Audi's web presence is German-engineering luxury — the Four Rings logo, a near-monochrome chrome with pure-white canvas and dark gray ink, and cinematic vehicle photography in muted automotive-grade lighting. The atmosphere is precision-luxury: every CTA, every section break, every photograph reads as 'designed by engineers, finished by designers.'

design_language.motion_signature: Cinematic editorial fade-ins (300ms ease-out). Hero photography uses slow ken-burns pans (8-second cycles). Configurator color changes use a hard 200ms crossfade rather than spring transitions. The brand reads as engineered-precision.

trademark_signals: Four Rings logo — the brand mark, pure black on white
Audi Type — the proprietary humanist sans, runs display through body
Audi Red (#bb0a30) — scarce CTA accent, signature heritage color from the racing program
Cinematic vehicle photography in muted automotive-grade lighting
Configurator-style product pages with exterior color, interior trim, wheel selection
ai_slop_avoided: Don't replace Audi Type with Helvetica or Inter — the humanist German-precision proportions are signature
Don't add saturated brand-blue accents — Audi chrome is monochrome + red
Don't sanitize the cinematic photography — automotive-grade lighting is the brand
Don't soften card radii above 8px — German precision
